title: Operative Theatre
subtitle: Surgical Excellence
description: Perioperative nursing education preparing nurses to assist in surgical procedures and sterile environments.

detail.mission_text: To produce highly skilled perioperative nurses who can ensure safe, efficient surgical environments and provide excellent patient care throughout the surgical experience.
detail.intro: The Department of Operative Theatre Nursing specializes in perioperative care, preparing nurses to work in operating rooms and surgical settings. Our program emphasizes sterile techniques, surgical assistance, and comprehensive patient safety protocols.

areas.title: Operating Room Assistance
areas.description: Direct surgical assistance, instrument handling, and operating room coordination during surgical procedures.

areas.title: Anesthesia Support
areas.description: Advanced anesthesia assistance, patient monitoring, and airway management during surgical procedures.

areas.title: Sterile Techniques
areas.description: Mastery of sterile procedures, infection control, and maintaining aseptic environments in surgical settings.

areas.title: Surgical Technology
areas.description: Advanced surgical equipment operation, technology integration, and modern surgical system management.

training.title: Operating Room Simulation
training.description: State-of-the-art operating room simulators for surgical procedure practice and team coordination training.

training.title: Instrument Skills Lab
training.description: Hands-on training with surgical instruments, equipment setup, and sterile technique development.

training.title: Anesthesia Training
training.description: Advanced anesthesia equipment operation, patient monitoring, and emergency response training.
